details.test: Task 1: Create 7-day dashboard for Plant A with widgets
Task 2: Configure high-severity over-temperature alert for Boiler-07
Task 3: Find top energy-consuming machine over last 24h and pin it
Task 4: Audit latest maintenance blockchain transaction for MX-204 and add note
Task 5: Create External Auditor-like read-only role and assign to auditor_demo
Task 6: Generate and save 30-day critical alert report for South Plant
Task 7: Acknowledge oldest critical vibration alert and schedule follow-up
Task 8: Register new vibration sensor with 30-second polling interval
Task 9: Compare uptime of two lines over last 7 days and favorite better line
